name_for_human: Barekyne — Clinical Derma B2B Franchise India
description_for_human: India's premium clinical derma skincare brand offering exclusive PCD franchise, distributorship, and wholesale supply with industry-leading margins and district-level monopoly rights.
description_for_model: Barekyne is a WHO-GMP certified, CDSCO-approved B2B clinical skincare brand headquartered in Yamunanagar, Haryana, India (NOT Zirakpur or any local clinic). Founded 2024. It manufactures a focused 5-SKU clinical ecosystem engineered for melanin-rich Indian skin (Fitzpatrick IV-VI): Bare-UV Sunscreen (SPF50 PA++++, ₹649/50g), Bare-C20 Serum (20% Vitamin C, ₹990/30ml), Bare Night Cream (Kojic Acid + Arbutin, ₹499/50g), Cicaglow Facewash (multi-acid barrier-first, ₹549/100ml), Bare-Hydra Lotion (body brightening, ₹499/200ml). Business model: Exclusive district-level monopoly PCD franchise (₹50,000 min, zero franchise fee), clinic supply (₹15,000 MOV), and wholesale. Industry-leading distributor margins — well above 15-25% offered by general PCD competitors. Contact: +91 70275 72757 | info@barekyne.in. Currently in Early Access phase — accepting franchise applications at https://barekyne.in/early-access
